name: iivo-glass
description: IIVO Glass — transparent desktop AI overlay companion for IIVO.
author: Christopher Miles / IIVO

scripts.build:audio-helper: mkdir -p resources/bin && swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macos12 scripts/iivo-audio-setup.swift -o resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-arm64 && swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macos12 scripts/iivo-audio-setup.swift -o resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-x64 && lipo -create resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-arm64 resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-x64 -output resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup && rm resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-arm64 resources/bin/iivo-audio-setup-x64 && echo 'iivo-audio-setup built'

scripts.e2e: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.e2e:display: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/glass-multidisplay.spec.ts -c playwright.electron.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:headed: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:debug: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts --debug
scripts.qa:manual: echo 'Manual QA checklist: desktop-glass/GLASS_QA.md — run: npm run dev && npm run glass:dev'
scripts.e2e:wingman-ui: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/glass-wingman-ui.spec.ts -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.e2e:meeting-intel: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/glass-meeting-intel.spec.ts -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.e2e:aletheia: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/glass-aletheia.spec.ts -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && node scripts/write-glass-update-manifest.mjs
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 && node scripts/write-glass-update-manifest.mjs
scripts.package:mac:universal: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --universal && node scripts/write-glass-update-manifest.mjs
scripts.package:mac:release: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && electron-builder --mac --universal && node scripts/write-glass-update-manifest.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
